name: Old Store Clerk (Type 1)
description: Elderly Asian female clerk. Deep wrinkles, promient nasolabial folds, age spots, hooded eyelids. Silver-gray hair in a low bun. Thin, wrinkled limbs.
face_id: Deep wrinkles, prominent nasolabial folds and marionette lines, age spots/hyperpigmentation, silver-gray hair pulled back into a low small bun, hooded/drooping eyelids.
body_map: Thin, wiry limbs with wrinkled skin, prominent collarbones and shoulder blades, a dark mole/blemish on the outer right forearm.
physics: Normal store clerk attire. (Since Type 1, outfits change based on scene).
